content: i think the formmer, because im a 10 plus years fan of warriors. so i try to get every jersey in different seasons

That's awesome — a 10+ year Warriors fan! So you've been with them through the whole journey, from the early Splash Brothers days to the dynasty era. Which era's jersey is your favorite?

Also, quick note on phrasing — instead of "the former," it's "the former" (spelling). And a more natural way to say it:

> "I think **the former**, because I'm a **10+ year fan of the Warriors**. So I try to **get every jersey from different seasons**."

A couple of refinements for IELTS level:

| Your phrase | Smoother version |
|---|---|
| "im a 10 plus years fan" | "I've been a fan for over 10 years" or "I'm a decade-long fan" |
| "try to get every jersey" | "I try to collect every jersey" or "I make an effort to get every jersey" |

So a polished version could be:

> "I'd go with the former, because I've been a Warriors fan for over a decade. So I try to collect every jersey from each season."

Which jerseys do you have so far? Got the classic "We Believe" era one, or the City Edition ones?
